name: @absolutejs/meeting
description: Meeting-bot core for AbsoluteJS — join a call (via a source adapter), transcribe it live with the voice scribe, and surface diarized turns + participants for analysis
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external @absolutejs/voice && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --project tsconfig.json
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run build && bun publish
